channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Political Prisoner Group Challenges 'Ghost Witness' in Illegal Possession Case
item.description: Political prisoner support group Kapatid denounced the prosecution's reliance on a 'ghost witness' in the illegal possession of firearms and explosives case against Vicente Ladlad, Alberto Villamor, a...

item.title: Rajinikanth's New Project 'Jailer 2' Audio Launch Speculated in Malaysia
item.description: The recent photograph of Rajinikanth has sparked widespread speculation about the upcoming audio launch of his film 'Jailer 2', which is rumored to be set for a special event in Malaysia. This develop...

item.title: GF Group Demonstrates Manufacturing Growth at Dar es Salaam Trade Fair as President Mwinyi Inspects Pavilion
item.description: During the 50th Dar es Salaam International Trade Fair (DITF), GF Group highlighted its expanding manufacturing capabilities and commitment to local industrial development. Zanzibar President Dr. Huss...

item.title: European unity showcased at Bastille Day celebrations amid Ukraine support and climate disruptions
item.description: This year's Bastille Day commemorations in Paris highlighted European solidarity and support for Ukraine, with a grand military parade featuring troops and aircraft from across the continent. Presiden...

item.title: B.C. Pilot Dies in Helicopter Crash During Colorado Wildfire Fight
item.description: A 56-year-old British Columbia pilot, Nicholas Dale, died after his helicopter crashed while battling the Gold Mountain Fire in Colorado. The incident occurred on Sunday near Silver Jack Reservoir, so...

item.title: Madlanga Commission Delays Testimony After Advocate Andrea Johnson's Absence
item.description: The Madlanga Commission of Inquiry into corruption within the criminal justice system faced a one-day delay after Investigative Directorate Against Corruption (IDAC) head Advocate Andrea Johnson was u...

item.title: Federal ministers criticise Fazlur Rehman for remarks linking soldiers' sacrifices to their salaries
item.description: Federal ministers, mainly from the ruling PML-N, strongly criticised Jamiat Ulema-i-Islam-Fazl (JUI-F) chief Maulana Fazlur Rehman after he made remarks during a public gathering in Kasur regarding th...

item.title: Sam Neill's Legacy: Advocacy for Indigenous Justice and Australia's Future
item.description: Renowned New Zealand actor Sam Neill, who passed away at 78, was celebrated for his contributions to Australian and New Zealand cinema. His death sparked widespread tributes, with Prime Minister Antho...

item.title: Women Farmers Protest Against Bidadi Township Survey in Bengaluru
item.description: The Bidadi Township Project, a proposed urban development initiative in Karnataka, has sparked intense protests in Mandalahalli village. Women farmers, led by local activists, clashed with officials c...

item.title: Recognizing emotional abuse as domestic violence
item.description: The article highlights how emotional and verbal abuse often goes unnoticed until it escalates to physical violence. It argues that society's focus on visible injuries delays recognition of non-physica...

item.title: Senator Marcoleta Undergoes Medical Examination at UP-PGH
item.description: Senator Rodante Marcoleta is scheduled to undergo a medical examination at the University of the Philippines Philippine General Hospital (UP-PGH) in Manila. The procedure comes after he was diagnosed ...

item.title: Sam Neill's Jurassic Park Character Inspired a Generation of Scientists
item.description: Sam Neill, the New Zealand actor who died at 78, was celebrated not only for his acting roles but also for his portrayal of Dr. Alan Grant in Jurassic Park, a character that inspired countless scienti...

item.title: US reimposes naval blockade on Iran and imposes oil transit fees amid regional tensions
item.description: Oil prices reached a four-week high as the United States reinstated a naval blockade on Iran and introduced a 20 per cent toll on cargo vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz. President Donald Trump'...

item.title: Teenager critically injured in Brisbane school stabbing incident
item.description: A 17-year-old student is fighting for his life after being stabbed by another student at the Islamic College of Brisbane on Acacia Road, Karawatha. The incident occurred around 11:47am on Tuesday and ...

item.title: Gen Z Entrepreneur Sharon Chebet Launches Coffin-Selling Business in Eldoret Using NYOTA Funds
item.description: Sharon Chebet, a young entrepreneur from Eldoret, has turned her personal tragedy into a successful business by selling coffins. Inspired by her father's disrespectful burial, she started the venture ...

item.title: Pocket Doors Experience Resurgence in Modern Homes Due to Practicality and Accessibility
item.description: Pocket doors, which slide into walls when opened, are gaining popularity in North American homes due to their practicality, versatility, and accessibility benefits. First introduced in the 1880s as te...

item.title: Sony's Shift to Digital Gaming Sparks Debate Over Ownership Rights
item.description: Sony's decision to phase out physical PlayStation games has ignited a broader debate about digital ownership in the gaming industry. Retro game store owner Sean Sterling of Kelowna, B.C., argues that ...

item.title: Political Tensions Rise Over Administrative Delays in Tanzania
item.description: Political tensions are escalating in Tanzania as a cryptic social media message highlights growing frustration over administrative delays and internal disagreements. The Swahili phrase 'Chaumma bado h...

item.title: LeBron James' children: Bronny, Bryce, and Zhuri's paths in sports and fashion
item.description: LeBron James, the NBA legend, has three children with his wife Savannah: Bronny, Bryce, and Zhuri. Bronny, the eldest, is a basketball player who was drafted by the Los Angeles Lakers in 2024. He face...

item.title: Municipal funding cuts and systemic failures exacerbate local economic despair
item.description: The article critiques South Africa's failure to address illegal migration and municipal underfunding, highlighting how constitutional obligations are unmet. It argues that withholding R13.5bn from 69 ...
